violations.text: Food items in the Open-Air Cooler were observed held at 42-44 degrees Fahrenheit, and Milk in the Walk-In Cooler was observed held at 44 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Call was made for service at time of inspection. Per the PIC, refrigeration service to be scheduled for same day. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2025

The Open-Air Cooler and the Walk-In Cooler were observed maintaining Time/Temperature Control for Safety (TCS) Foods at 42 to 44. Units are to be adjusted to properly maintain TCS Food Temperatures at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. (Call made for service at time of inspection.) New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2025
